mapper.select: SELECT U.USER_ID as userId, U.USER_NAME as userName, U.EMAIL as email, D.DEPT_NAME as deptName FROM T_USER U INNER JOIN T_DEPT D ON U.DEPT_CODE = D.DEPT_CODE WHERE U.DEPT_CODE = #{deptCode} AND U.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY U.USER_NAME

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM T_USER WHERE DEPT_CODE = #{deptCode}
AND USE_YN = 'Y'
